description_long: This object is a compact, rectangular electronic device with a protruding metallic connector, resembling a USB flash drive. The main body is made of matte black plastic, with a slightly stepped design on one end and a metallic USB-A plug on the other. The USB connector features two visible contact holes and a flat, shiny surface, while the body is solid and unadorned, with subtle geometric lines and edges. The device appears to be a portable data storage or interface device, commonly used for transferring digital files or connecting peripherals. Its size and form factor suggest it is designed for easy handling and portability, fitting comfortably in a pocket or on a keychain. There are no visible buttons, screens, or branding, emphasizing its utilitarian and minimalist design.
description: A small, black, rectangular electronic device with a metallic USB connector, resembling a USB flash drive. The body is matte and unadorned, designed for portability and easy handling.
description_view_0: Front view shows the metallic USB connector with two contact holes and the flat face of the device.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the length of the device, the stepped design at the back, and the protruding USB plug.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, stepped end of the device, with no visible connectors or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the full length and thickness, with the USB connector extending outward.
